SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement is made on the 5th day of October 2023.

BETWEEN

1. Dr. Alex Tan, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, contact number +65 6123 4567, email: alex.tan@example.sg;

2. Bright Future Investments Pte. Ltd., UEN 201312345Z, having its registered office at 456 Raffles Place, #12-34, Singapore 048616, contact number +65 6789 0123, email: info@brightfuture.sg;

3. Mr. John Lim, NRIC No. S3456789C, residing at 789 Bukit Timah Road, Singapore 259999, contact number +65 6354 7890, email: john.lim@singnet.sg;

WHEREAS the Parties have agreed to enter into this Shareholders Agreement to govern their relationship as shareholders of Innovative Tech Solutions Pte. Ltd., and agree on a capital contribution of SGD 500,000.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
